prompt: Crie uma landing page para um SaaS B2B de gestao de projetos, estilo Linear

assertions.name: asks-vibe-or-confirms-style
assertions.description: Asks about vibe or confirms the minimal dark style before coding

assertions.name: generates-design-tokens-first
assertions.description: Generates CSS custom properties with design tokens BEFORE writing HTML

assertions.name: dark-mode-color-tokens
assertions.description: Defines dark mode palette consistent with Linear-style aesthetic

assertions.name: uses-8px-spacing-system
assertions.description: Uses multiples of 8px for spacing (padding, margin, gap)

assertions.name: includes-gsap-scrolltrigger
assertions.description: Includes GSAP ScrollTrigger for scroll-based animations

assertions.name: responsive-3-breakpoints
assertions.description: Has responsive styles for mobile, tablet, and desktop

note: Run Skill Creator eval cycle to score assertions
